page_content:
AMST204 Film and American Culture Studies (3 Credits)

Exploration of the American film from a historical perspective, illustrating the motion picture's role as an institutional phenomenon, as a form of communication, and as a source of cross-cultural study.

AMST205 American Material Culture: The Study of People, Places, and Things (3 Credits)

Historical survey of American material culture. Ways of describing and

interpreting accumulated material evidence (e.g., buildings, town plans) introduced by stressing relationship between artifact and culture.
